title: fagelia gracilis
intro: Fagelia gracilis, also known as the Slender Fagelia, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Acanthaceae. It is native to tropical regions and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including relieving congestion and soothing irritated throats. Fagelia gracilis is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused in hot water to harness its medicinal properties.
